subject: [PATCH v4 4/4] testing: add dontcache-bench local filesystem benchmark suite

2026-05-01.patch_summary: This patch adds a new benchmark suite called 'dontcache-bench' to test the IOCB_DONTCACHE flag on local filesystems using fio's io_uring engine. The suite includes various tests, such as competing buffered vs. dontcache writers and a benchmark mirroring Jens Axboe's original RWF_UNCACHED write test. The patch also includes job files for fio, scripts to run the benchmarks and parse results, and makes changes to several files in the kernel source tree.
